title_tag: Ngor Island Senegal | Surf, Stay & Relax
meta_description: Discover Ngor Island in Senegal: surf, relax and enjoy island life just off Dakar with easy access to waves, beaches and local culture.
hero_subtitle: A peaceful island escape off Dakar with surf, beaches and authentic Senegalese charm.
intro: Ngor Island is one of the most special places to stay in Dakar for surfers, travelers and anyone looking for a laid-back Atlantic escape. Just a short boat ride from the mainland, this small island blends beautiful ocean views, easy beach access and a calm local atmosphere that makes every stay feel unique.

sections.h2: Discover the charm of Ngor Island
sections.content: Ngor Island sits just off the coast of Dakar and offers a quiet, car-free setting that feels worlds away from the city. It is known for its relaxed rhythm, friendly local community and beautiful seaside scenery, making it an ideal base for a surf trip in Senegal or a simple island getaway.
bullets: Beautiful ocean views and beach access

sections.h2: A great base for surfing in Senegal
sections.content: For surfers, Ngor Island is perfectly placed near some of the best-known waves in the Dakar area. Staying here means you can enjoy quick access to the ocean while returning to a quieter setting after your sessions, combining convenience with the relaxed spirit of island life.
bullets: Ideal location for a surf stay in Dakar
Easy access to nearby surf spots
Perfect for beginners and experienced surfers
Relaxed atmosphere after time in the water

sections.h2: Island life, beaches and local experience
sections.content: Beyond surfing, Ngor Island is a wonderful place to slow down and enjoy the simple pleasures of coastal Senegal. Walk along the shore, swim in clear water, watch the fishing boats come and go, and experience the warm, welcoming character that makes the island so memorable.
bullets: Quiet beaches for swimming and relaxing

sections.content: Choosing Ngor Island gives you the best of both worlds: easy access to Dakar and a more peaceful place to unwind. It is a great option for surf travelers, couples, solo guests and anyone who wants to enjoy Senegal from a beautiful island setting close to the city.
bullets: Short boat ride from the mainland
Close to Dakar while feeling far away
Ideal for surf trips and relaxing holidays

cta_heading: Plan your stay on Ngor Island
cta_text: Ready to experience surf, sunshine and island life in Senegal? Book your stay with Ngor Surfcamp Teranga and enjoy the unique atmosphere of Ngor Island.
og_title: Ngor Island, Senegal | Surf, Stay & Relax
og_description: Explore Ngor Island in Senegal, a peaceful surf and beach escape just off Dakar with authentic local charm and easy access to the waves.
